output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?book rdfs:label 'A Tale of Two Cities' @en ; wdt:P577 ?year .
}
ORDER BY ?year
LIMIT 1
output.formatted:
1859

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?book rdfs:label 'A Tale of Two Cities' @en ; wdt:P577 ?year .
}
ORDER BY ?year
LIMIT 1
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| year                                |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 1859-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
